title: Topstep vs Bulenox (2026): SB Lock vs SB+$100 Lock, Phase-Shift vs Fork-Lock Trail
description: Topstep vs Bulenox — both ship a $3K drawdown on 100K, both have a 100%-first-$10K payout carve-out. Then opposite lock floors, opposite trail philosophies (Topstep phase-shifts intraday→EOD across Combine and XFA; Bulenox forces a permanent Option 1 vs Option 2 fork at signup). Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Topstep vs Bulenox (2026): SB Lock vs SB+$100 Lock, Phase-Shift vs Fork-Lock Trail
og.description: Same $3K drawdown on 100K, opposite lock floors and opposite trail philosophies. Topstep phase-shifts mechanics for you; Bulenox makes you pick at signup forever.
